Localization.Description: An attempt to gain persistence on a host by changing a shell configuration file. Attackers can gain persistence in a system by inserting commands into scripts automatically executed by shells.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} attempted to gain persistence by changing shell configuration file "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
An attempt to gain persistence by changing shell configuration file "{object.name}" was detected on host {event_src.host}
